# terrible_community_general_jboss (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `deployment` (String) The name of the deployment.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `deploy_path` (String) The location in the filesystem where the deployment scanner listens.
- `src` (String) The remote path of the application ear or war to deploy. Required when `state=present`. Ignored when `state=absent`.
- `state` (String) Whether the application should be deployed or undeployed.
